examples: I can feel that you mesmerize my heart.
He needs no bravado to mesmerize spectators.
You can mesmerize anyone you meet with your cultured attitude and outlook.
The crunchy, urgent power-pop of "Hand Me Down" opens the album on a particularly auspicious note, as crunchy guitars and Flotard's incomparable voice simultaneously destroy and mesmerize.
The Motorola Electrify, for instance, costs a Benjamin (after mail-in rebate, anyways), while you can get the HTC Wildfire S, LG Optimus U and Samsung Mesmerize for free with instant rebate.
